visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a warehouse-style supermarket. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan over a striped top, stands in front of a glass-door freezer. She smiles brightly and holds a box of 'Ristorante Pizza Mozzarella' toward the camera. (2) Close-up shot of the pizza box in her hands. The packaging features a picture of a thin-crust pizza with tomatoes and pesto. Yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. (3) The woman is seen again in the supermarket aisle. She points toward the nearly empty freezer shelves where the product is stored, gesturing with her hands to indicate its high demand. The camera pans across the freezer, showing limited stock remaining. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor dining area. Two women, including the one from the supermarket and another wearing a black bucket hat, sit at a table. They are holding slices of the cooked pizza and taking bites. Their facial expressions convey enjoyment. (5) Close-up shots of the baked pizza on a cutting board, highlighting the melted white mozzarella, red cherry tomatoes, and green pesto sauce. (6) The two women continue eating and talking to the camera. They give thumbs-up gestures and smile frequently while pointing at the pizza slices.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 嗨~. (3) [Subtitle]: 你為什麼拿披薩. (4) [Variety]: 隱藏款超美味. [Variety]: 一片120元. (5) [Subtitle]: 摩佐瑞拉起司. [Subtitle]: 薄脆披薩. (6) [Subtitle]: 359元裡面有三片. (7) [Subtitle]: 只剩一點點耶. (8) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 只有這邊有一點點. (9) [Subtitle]: 好像很好吃 所以大家都搶光了. (10) [Subtitle]: 嗯 他銷量是真的很誇張耶. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個是網路上討論度也很高的. (12) [Variety]: boring了. (13) [Subtitle]: 可以外銷全世界的. (14) [Variety]: 神級披薩. (15) [Subtitle]: 是先鋪一層番茄紅醬. (16) [Variety]: 鋪滿滿的莫札瑞拉起司. (17) [Subtitle]: 一口咬開 香味十足. (18) [Variety]: 一片120元. (19) [Subtitle]: 超棒.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a white cardigan; the other wears a black bucket hat and a white lace-trimmed top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half takes place in a Costco warehouse with large freezers and industrial shelving. The second half is a domestic indoor setting with a dining table, a pet cage visible in the background, and warm home lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female greeting. Upbeat acoustic guitar BGM with a steady 4/4 beat begins. A metallic sliding sound of a freezer door is heard. (2) Lively dialogue between a woman and an off-screen male voice. The woman speaks with high pitch and fast tempo, expressing excitement. Background noise of a supermarket floor is subtle. (3) Transition to an indoor room tone. Distinct sound of a ceramic plate clinking. Female voice describes flavors with animated intonation. (4) Clear crunching sound of biting into a crisp crust. A small 'ding' sound effect highlights a text pop-up. (5) Both female voices overlap as they discuss the price and quality. The music swells slightly, maintaining a cheerful, major-mode atmosphere until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and food recommendation vlog. It starts with a 'hook' at a Costco warehouse to show a popular, nearly sold-out frozen pizza product, then transitions to a home environment for a taste test to validate the quality and value of the item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of the brand 'Dr. Oetker Ristorante' and explicit mention of the shopping location 'Costco', combined with positive verbal reviews.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high speech density and rapid visual cuts are characteristic of social media short-form content designed to retain attention through fast information delivery.
